stemHtml: Before operating in Oceanic or Remote airspace, RNP 4 requires that an aircraft be equipped with which of the following?

options.b: GNSS and input from VOR/DME or DME/DME RNAV equipment
options.c: GNSS or input from DME/DME RNAV equipment only
options.d: Input from VOR/DME or DME/DME RNAV equipment
